markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align SEO strategy with the new product roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The SEO strategy will shift from its current 80/20 conversion-to-awareness focus to a more balanced approach.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [**New Product Funnel:** The strategy must support a new product pyramid: free entry points (MCP, CLI, Intent App) → team automation (Code Review) → enterprise solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [**Dual-Track SEO:** The plan will combine long-term foundational work (e.g., dominating "AI coding" keywords) with high-risk, high-reward experiments (e.g., AI-generated docs).](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=1970.0)
  - [**New Tools for Content:** Liz will use the new "Augment Workspace" and an internal sales call analysis tool to create prompts for the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Current Strategy

  - [**Conversions:** Creeping up post-holiday, but not yet statistically significant.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [**Page Rankings:** Page 1 rankings continue to increase.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [**Traffic:** A recent guides traffic drop was a planned redirect and is expected to recover.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [**Content Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [**"8 best AI coding..."** → High traffic, low conversions (3 signups/30 days).](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [**"cloud code vs augment"** → High traffic, high conversions (18 signups/30 days).](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Current Strategy:** 80% bottom-of-funnel (BoF), 20% top-of-funnel (ToF) content.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
      - [**Recommendation:** Improve the narrative and trust-building in the top 10 performance pieces, informed by Reddit discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

### New Product Roadmap & Strategic Pivot

  - [**New Product Funnel:** A new product pyramid will guide the SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [**Base (Awareness):** Free entry points for individual devs.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
          - [**MCP (Context Engine):** Low-friction install to get a taste of Augment.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
          - [**Intent App:** A new, full-fledged app for local multi-agent dev work, launching next week.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
      - [**Mid-Tier (Team Automation):** First step toward team-level automation.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
          - [**Code Review Tool:** The primary product for this tier.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [**Top (Enterprise Solutions):** Complex, high-value solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
          - [**Content:** Technical tutorials and solution-selling narratives.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal:** Balance the "slow and steady grind" of foundational SEO with "runaway success" experiments to accelerate growth.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=1970.0)

### New Tools & Experiments

  - [**Augment Workspace:** A new proprietary tool for generating content.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
      - [**Key Feature:** A shared library of 100k+ prompts across 1,500 industries.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [**Action:** Liz will use this to build custom prompts aligned with the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [**Sales Call Analysis Tool:** An internal tool to analyze sales calls.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
      - [**Action:** Liz will use this to extract real-world use cases and quotes for enterprise content.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [**AI-Generated Docs:** An experimental Deep-Weekly clone.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
      - [**Goal:** Generate docs for thousands of repos to capture long-tail keyword traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Liz:**](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [Scope a new SEO strategy balancing BoF and ToF content, with trade-off analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [Use the sales call analysis tool to inform enterprise content prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
      - [Begin building custom prompts in the Augment Workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [**Sylvain:**](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [Finalize and share the new product "pyramid" strategy with Liz within two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/E5exyeW2tzPam-SUy4SoFD6CxBXZJsVq?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
